Class-Bard 20 — Male Human Bard: 20
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 16 (+3) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 11 (+0) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 18 (+4)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 3; Constitution: 1; Dexterity: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 607595/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Spell Recall: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma)
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Peerless Skill: Can add a Bardic Inspiration die to a failed ability check; does not expend a use on failure
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Bard (Bard Subclass)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Boon Of Spell Recall; Grappler; Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Bard Features: Armor Training (Light); Bard Subclass; Bardic Inspiration; Battle Magic; Beguiling Magic; Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Lore); College Of Dance; College Of Glamour; College Of Lore; College Of Valor; Combat Inspiration; Countercharm; Cutting Words; Dazzling Footwork; Epic Boon; Expertise; Extra Attack; Font Of Inspiration; Inspiring Movement; Jack Of All Trades; Leading Evasion; Magical Discoveries; Magical Secrets; Mantle Of Inspiration; Mantle Of Majesty; Martial Training; Peerless Skill; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from any); Spellcasting; Superior Inspiration; Tandem Footwork; Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any Musical Instrument); Unbreakable Majesty; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons); Words Of Creation Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Bard Subclass: 1 selection
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +6 Insight: (wis) +15 Performance: (cha) +7
Animal Handling: (wis) +9 Intimidation: (cha) +10 Persuasion: (cha) +7
Arcana: (int) +12 Investigation: (int) +6 Religion: (int) +6
Athletics: (str) +5 Medicine: (wis) +9 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +6
Deception: (cha) +7 Nature: (int) +6 Stealth: (dex) +9
History: (int) +12 Perception: (wis) +6 Survival: (wis) +15
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Arcana; History; Insight; Intimidation; Investigation; Medicine; Nature; Religion; Stealth; Survival
Expertise: Arcana; History; Insight; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex); Drum: (cha); Horn: (cha); Pan Flute: (cha)
Skill Notes:
Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Lore): Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Expertise: +6 on 4 chosen proficient skills
Jack Of All Trades: +3 on non-proficient skill checks
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Dazzling Footwork: When unarmored and not using a shield, has advantage on Performance checks that involve dancing
Combat
Hit Points: 101 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 17
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Club (+8 1d4+2 B; Slow); Javelin (+8 1d6+2 P R30/120; Slow); Quarterstaff (+8 1d6+2 B [2h d8]; Topple); Unarmed Strike (+9 1d12+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dazzling Footwork: When unarmored and not using a shield, gains +4 Armor Class and can use Dexterity for unarmed strikes that inflict increased damage
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Martial Training: Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)/Armor Training (Medium; Shield)
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Bardic Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action 4 times per short rest to give an ally +1d12 on an ability check, attack, or save within 1 hr
Battle Magic: Can use a bonus action to make a weapon attack after casting a 1-action bard spell
Combat Inspiration: Allies can use a Bardic Inspiration die to boost weapon damage or as a reaction to an attack to boost Armor Class
Countercharm: R30' Can use a reaction to give a target a reroll with advantage on a save vs. charmed or frightened
Cutting Words: R60' Can use a reaction to subtract a Bardic Inspiration die from a foe roll
Dazzling Footwork: When unarmored and not using a shield, can make an unarmed strike as part of using Bardic Inspiration for an action or reaction
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Font Of Inspiration: Bardic Inspiration refreshes after a short rest
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Inspiring Movement: When a foe ends its turn within 5', can use a reaction and expend a use of Bardic Inspiration to allow self and an ally within 30' to move half Speed without provoking opportunity attacks
Mantle Of Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action and expend a Bardic Inspiration use to give 4 targets 1d12 * 2 temporary hit points and to allow them to use a reaction to make an immediate move without provoking opportunity attacks
Peerless Skill: Can add a Bardic Inspiration die to a failed attack; does not expend a use on failure
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Superior Inspiration: Has a minimum of 2 uses of Bardic Inspiration available after initiative
Tandem Footwork: Can expend a use of Bardic Inspiration to give self and allies within 30' +1d12 initiative
Unbreakable Majesty: Can use a bonus action to cause foes attacking self to miss with their first attack each rd (save DC 18 Charisma negates) for 1 min once per short rest
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Dexterity
Save: Charisma: +10; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +9; Intelligence: +0; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +3
Save Notes: Leading Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage; can share this benefit with adjacent allies
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: B0: 4; B: 22 Spell Slots: B1: 4; B2: 3; B3: 3; B4: 3; B5: 3; B6: 2; B7: 2; B8: 1; B9: 1 Attack: B: +10; C: +9; D: +9; W: +6 Spell DC: B: 18; C: 17; D: 17; W: 14
Spells:
Awaken (B5 Tran): Touched beast or plant gains Intelligence 10, speech, and movement and becomes charmed for 30 days or until harmed
Charm Person (B1 [Beguiling Magic] Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Command (B1 [Mantle Of Majesty] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Cure Wounds (B1 Evoc): 1
Dimension Door (B4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dispel Magic (B3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Enhance Ability (B2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Enthrall (B2 Ench): R60' Target suffers -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Faerie Fire (B1 Evoc): R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (B1 Tran): R60' 5 falling targets slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Hallucinatory Terrain (B4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Heat Metal (B2 Tran): R60' Touching the target metal inflicts 2d8 HP fire, plus attack and ability disadvantage if the the target is worn or held (save Constitution negates disadvantage), for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to repeat the initial damage [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Hypnotic Pattern (B3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Light (B0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Magnificent Mansion (B7 Conj): 1
Major Image (B3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Mass Suggestion (B6 Ench): R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or any ally ends the effects [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9]
Message (B0 Tran): R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Mirror Image (B2 [Beguiling Magic] Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Modify Memory (B5 Ench): R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; a target in battle has advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell [+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Polymorph (B4 Tran): R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast, with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Power Word Heal (B9 [Words Of Creation] Ench): R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Power Word Kill (B9 [Words Of Creation] Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Prestidigitation (B0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Raise Dead (B5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Resurrection (B7 Necr): Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Speak With Animals (B1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
True Seeing (B6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (B0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +10 attack bonus and inflicts +3d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Magic Notes:
Beguiling Magic: Casting an enchantment or illusion spell allows inflicting a choice of charmed or frightened on a target within 60' (save Wisdom negates) once per long rest; can expend uses of Bardic Inspiration for additional uses
Boon Of Spell Recall: Casting a level 1-4 spell does not use a spell slot if a d4 roll equals the spell level
Font Of Inspiration: Can expend a spell slot to regain 1 Bardic Inspiration use
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Magical Discoveries: Can learn 2 additional spells from the Cleric, Druid, and Wizard spell lists
Magical Secrets: Can learn spells from the Cleric, Druid, and Wizard spell lists
Mantle Of Majesty: Can use bonus actions to cast Command without expending a spell slot once per rd for concentration up to 1 min once per long rest; can expend level 3+ spell slots for additional uses
Martial Training: Can use a simple or martial weapon as a bard spellcasting focus
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the bard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Words Of Creation: Knows the Power Word Heal and Power Word Kill spells; can target 2 creatures within 10' of each other when casting them
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 4 allocated
